chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-748 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 21.05.2025 Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Sarfaraz Khan Jamali, advocate holds brief for Mr. Sarfaraz Ali Abbasi, counsel for respondents No.2 to 9. ------ Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed for following relief(s): a. To declare that the act of Respondents for awarding promotion as Superintendent/Branch Superintendant (BS-17) to the respondents No.10 to 13, being juniors to the petitioner, and not considering the case of petitioner for such promotion, is illegal, based on malafide and against the law, rules and natural justice; b. To direct the official respondents, to consider the case of petitioner keeping in view of the seniority/length of service of the petitioner and submissions as above for his due promotion from the post of Assistant (BS-16) to the post of Superintendent/Branch Superintendant (BS-17). Since the petitioner seeks his promotion, which in view of rules framed by the University itself as non staturory rules; hence has a remedy before the Syndicate of the University. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition; however, submits that petitioner may be allowed to approach the respondents through an application. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh has no objection. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with observation that the petitioner will approach the Syndicate by filing an application for redressal of his grievance; the Syndicate shall, after due notice to all concerned, decide the fate of application strictly in accordance with law.

Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh has no objection. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with observation that the petitioner will approach the Syndicate by filing an application for redressal of his grievance; the Syndicate shall, after due notice to all concerned, decide the fate of application strictly in accordance with law. Judge Judge Manzoor
